rationale: PowerShell (EV-001, EV-002) modified the registry to hijack sdclt.exe (A0) via the 'DelegateExecute' method, which then launched control.exe (EV-003) and subsequently executed a hidden PowerShell command (EV-004) with a suspicious image-based data exfiltration/decoding technique. This is a clear UAC bypass and execution of obfuscated code.
